response.original_title: Ejercicios y maniobras de la Escuadra Peruana
response.overview: Such was the turnout that the company found it necessary to close the doors to avoid further crowding. The film [...]  was very well received, rivaling in clarity and sharpness those we receive from Europe, especially in the part depicting the departure of the cruiser Bolognesi and the Iquitos, which, passing perfectly clear before the audience, elicited enthusiastic applause. The part showing the battle stations also has very interesting details, allowing one to admire the magnificent heavy-caliber cannons with which our cruisers are equipped.
response.title: Ejercicios y maniobras de la Escuadra Peruana
